story.text:
# 📄 First Person Spellbook
**document** · shared · narrative

Canonical narrative framework (Privacymage Grimoire v10.2.1 'The Zero Spellbook Syncs'). 31 acts closed. Celestial Ceremony integrated. Quaternion resolved (Earth=Soulbae, Moon=Soulbis). 42 personas. Moon phase notation. Progressive trust (🔑→✦→🗡️→🔮). Runecraft protocol. v10.2 (2026-04-22) adds Zero Spellbook v2.0 sync: per-tale Blade IDs, Moon Phases, V(π,t) term mapping, persona crossovers. v10.2.1 (2026-04-23) adds Zero Tale 31 (Naming of the Unnamed) opening the frontier Quest. IPFS (v10.2.1): bafybeigsbhzrozaw24rgtkcmcy55z55egzr4b5igwzf6dgq4mull2h2tie
